languages.text:
This obelisk is temporarily overcharged beyond its capacity. All creatures in combat receive 1 stack of {g|f:423eeff6a2004439867f1cfee6feb02f}Fluctuating Power{/g} while it stands.
Upon destruction, this obelisk deals Direct damage equal to 15% maximum Wounds to all creatures in combat.

languages.text:
Этот обелиск временно пребывает в гиперфазе. Все существа получают +1 уровень {g|f:423eeff6a2004439867f1cfee6feb02f}выплеска энергии{/g}.
При уничтожении этот обелиск наносит {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}прямой урон{/g} всем существам, равный 15% от их {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}максимального здоровья{/g}.

languages.text:
Dieser Obelisk wir über seine Kapazität hinaus hyperphasiert. Alle Kreaturen erhalten +1 Stapel {g|f:423eeff6a2004439867f1cfee6feb02f}Fluktuierende Energie{/g}.
Wird er zerstört, fügt dieser Obelisk allen Kreaturen {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}Direktschaden{/g} in Höhe von 15 % seiner {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}maximalen Wunden{/g} zu.

languages.text:
Este obelisco está en un estado de hiperfase temporal que supera sus límites. Todas las criaturas obtienen +1 acumulación de {g|f:423eeff6a2004439867f1cfee6feb02f}poder fluctuante{/g}.
Cuando se destruye, el obelisco inflige {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}daño directo{/g} a todas las criaturas igual al 15 % de sus {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}heridas máximas{/g}.
languages.original_text:
This obelisk is temporarily hyperphased beyond its limits. All creatures gain +1 stack of {g|f:423eeff6a2004439867f1cfee6feb02f}fluctuating power{/g}.
When destroyed, this obelisk deals {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}direct damage{/g} to all creatures equal to 15% of their {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}maximum wounds{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
Este obelisco está en un estado de hiperfase temporal que supera sus límites de seguridad. Todas las criaturas obtienen +1 acumulación de {g|f:423eeff6a2004439867f1cfee6feb02f}poder fluctuante{/g}.
Cuando se destruye, el obelisco inflige {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}daño directo{/g} a todas las criaturas igual al 15 % de sus {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}heridas máximas{/g}.

languages.text:
Bu dikili taş geçici süreyle, sınırlarının ötesinde hiperevrelenir. Tüm yaratıklar, +1 {g|f:423eeff6a2004439867f1cfee6feb02f}taşan güç{/g} birikimi kazanır.
Bu dikili taş, imha edildiğinde tüm yaratıklara {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}maksimum sağlık{/g} puanlarının %15'i kadar {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}doğrudan hasar{/g} verir.

traits.locale_text:
Bu dikili taş geçici süreyle, sınırlarının ötesinde hiperevrelenir. Tüm yaratıklar, +1 {g|f:423eeff6a2004439867f1cfee6feb02f}taşan güç{/g} birikimi kazanır.
Bu dikili taş, imha edildiğinde tüm yaratıklara {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}maksimum sağlık{/g} puanlarının %15'i kadar {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}doğrudan hasar{/g} verir.

Bu dikili taş geçici süreyle, güvenli sınırlarının ötesinde hiperevrelenir. Tüm yaratıklar, +1 {g|f:423eeff6a2004439867f1cfee6feb02f}taşan güç{/g} birikimi kazanır.
Bu dikili taş, imha edildiğinde tüm yaratıklara {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}maksimum sağlık{/g} puanlarının %15'i kadar {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}doğrudan hasar{/g} verir.

languages.text:
该方尖碑目前处于超相位化状态，已超出安全阈值。所有生物获得1层{g|f:423eeff6a2004439867f1cfee6feb02f}能量波动{/g}。
该方尖碑被摧毁时，对所有生物造成等同于他们15%{g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}最大生命值{/g}的{g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}直击伤害{/g}。
languages.original_text:
This obelisk is temporarily hyperphased beyond its limits. All creatures gain +1 stack of {g|f:423eeff6a2004439867f1cfee6feb02f}fluctuating power{/g}.
When destroyed, this obelisk deals {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}direct damage{/g} to all creatures equal to 15% of their {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}maximum wounds{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
该方尖碑目前处于超相位化状态，已超出安全阈值。所有生物获得1层{g|f:423eeff6a2004439867f1cfee6feb02f}能量波动{/g}。
该方尖碑被摧毁时，对所有生物造成等同于他们15%{g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}最大生命值{/g}的{g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}直击伤害{/g}。

languages.text:
Cet obélisque est temporairement en hyperphase, au-delà de ses limites. Toutes les créatures gagnent +1 cumul de {g|f:423eeff6a2004439867f1cfee6feb02f}puissance fluctuante{/g}.
À sa destruction, cet obélisque inflige des {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}dégâts directs{/g} à toutes les créatures à hauteur de 15 % de leurs {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}blessures maximum{/g}.
languages.original_text:

When destroyed, this obelisk deals {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}direct damage{/g} to all creatures equal to 15% of their {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}maximum wounds{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
Cet obélisque est temporairement en hyperphase, au-delà de ses limites. Toutes les créatures gagnent +1 cumul de {g|f:423eeff6a2004439867f1cfee6feb02f}puissance fluctuante{/g}.
À sa destruction, cet obélisque inflige des {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}dégâts directs{/g} à toutes les créatures à hauteur de 15 % de leurs {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}blessures maximum{/g}.

Cet obélisque est temporairement en hyperphase, au-delà des limites de sécurité. Toutes les créatures gagnent +1 cumul de {g|f:423eeff6a2004439867f1cfee6feb02f}puissance fluctuante{/g}.
À sa destruction, cet obélisque inflige des {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}dégâts directs{/g} à toutes les créatures à hauteur de 15 % de leurs {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}blessures maximum{/g}.

languages.text:
このオベリスクは一時的に安全限界を超えて超増幅されている。すべてのクリーチャーは+1の{g|f:423eeff6a2004439867f1cfee6feb02f}変動力{/g}を得る。
破壊された時に、このオベリスクはすべてのクリーチャーに{g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}最大体力量{/g}の15%の{g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}直接ダメージ{/g}を与える。
languages.original_text:
This obelisk is temporarily hyperphased beyond its safe limits. All creatures gain +1 stack of {g|f:423eeff6a2004439867f1cfee6feb02f}fluctuating power{/g}.
When destroyed, this obelisk deals {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}direct damage{/g} to all creatures equal to 15% of their {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}maximum wounds{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
このオベリスクは一時的に安全限界を超えて超増幅されている。すべてのクリーチャーは+1の{g|f:423eeff6a2004439867f1cfee6feb02f}変動力{/g}を得る。
破壊された時に、このオベリスクはすべてのクリーチャーに{g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}最大体力量{/g}の15%の{g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}直接ダメージ{/g}を与える。
